topics.title: FDA finalizes safety reporting guidances for sponsors and investigators
topics.summary: The US Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has finalized two guidances for sponsors and investigators regarding adverse event reporting for drugs, biologics, and medical devices in clinical studies. Both guidances were issued on 16 December.

topics.title: FDA loosens restrictions on using patient-level RWD in medical device submissions
topics.summary: The US Food and Drug Administration (FDA) clarified in a final guidance dated 17 December that it will accept real-world evidence (RWE) without requiring identifiable patient-level data in medical device submissions. topics.title: FDA posts warning letters to manufacturers of breast binders
topics.summary: The US Food and Drug Administration (FDA) on Thursday issued warning letters to 12 manufacturers and retailers for illegally marketing breast binders to children for gender-affirming surgery.
